rationale: The cited paper appears only as a brief methodological precedent in the analysis section, where the authors justify using the most statistically significant CAR window for regression. It is cited in an "e.g." style alongside general event-study practice, without any further discussion of its theory, findings, or mechanisms. The citing paper does not build its conceptual framing, hypotheses, or contribution on the CMO/customer-power argument of the cited work.
